persona.name: Someone Who Sleeps
persona.description: Someone with a real bedtime — who protects the hour before it, and wakes up like a person.

milestones.title: Asleep by 11, thirty nights
milestones._comment: 20 of 21 — checking this off during the take completes it on camera

action.title: Lights out by 11pm
action.kickstartVersion: In bed by 11, even if you're not sleepy

action.title: No screens after 10:30
action.kickstartVersion: Dim the lights — that's the whole thing

action.title: Get up when the alarm goes
action.kickstartVersion: Feet on the floor. Nothing else.

_comment_history: missDaysAgo = every action missed that day (red on the calendar — proves 'a missed day never erases you'). partialDaysAgo = only the first scheduled action done (amber). Today is deliberately left unlogged so the demo can complete it on camera.

notes.6: Nearly skipped it — did the short version instead

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Someone Who Sleeps doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Someone Who Sleeps doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

onboardingAnswers: I'm exhausted all the time and I know it's because I go to bed at 1am scrolling.
I need a hard stop. Screens off by 10:30 and lights out at 11.
